news.title: Jim Cramer Shares Why Starbucks Corporation (SBUX) Went “Nuts”

news.title: Can Starbucks' 39% Channel Development Growth Add a New Revenue Lever?
news.summary: SBUX's Channel Development revenues jump 39% YoY in Q2, adding momentum beyond company-operated stores through packaged coffee and ready-to-drink products.

news.title: Chipotle Opens First Restaurant in Mexico as Global Expansion Continues (CMG)
news.summary: Chipotle Mexican Grill (NYSE:CMG) is preparing to open its first restaurant in Mexico this week, marking a major milestone in the company’s international growth strategy as it enters the country that inspired much of its menu. The restaurant chain, which operates more than 4,100 locations worldwide, described the launch as a significant step in its global expansion plans.

news.title: Starbucks rolls out quarterly bonuses for high-performing workers
news.summary: The latest perks could help the chain attract and retain workers needed to sustain its turnaround drive.

news.title: Starbucks Wants to Cut $400 Million in Software Costs. Toast Investors Should Pay Attention.
news.summary: Starbucks is ditching legacy software vendors for homegrown AI tools. Here's why that could eventually benefit companies like Toast.

news.title: BROS Trades at a Premium, Stock Up 30% in 3 Months: Buy Now or Wait?
news.summary: Dutch Bros has rallied on strong growth, store expansion and digital momentum, leaving investors weighing its premium valuation.

news.title: Starbucks Is Serving Up Your Coffee with a Side of AI. What That Means for SBUX Stock.
news.summary: Starbucks is reportedly developing in-house AI software to replace the ones it currently relies on.

news.title: Starbucks Builds Sovereign AI to Cut $400 Million in Software Costs
news.summary: Starbucks (SBUX) is building internal AI tools to replace Microsoft and IBM software, targeting $400 million in annual vendor spend and cutting $30 million from its tech budget.

news.title: Pushing the Edge: Super Micro Computer Reboots the AI Landscape
news.summary: Super Micro Computer launched a Kubernetes edge AI appliance with Red Hat and Portworx targeting sovereign AI demand, even as shares fell 30% and short interest rose to about 19% of its float.

news.title: Starbucks tries something it failed at before
news.summary: Ten months ago, in September 2025, Starbucks walked into 11,000 stores with NomadGo’s inventory Artificial Intelligence (AI) tool that promised 99% accuracy and counted up to eight times faster than a human.
